title: Awfis is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Awfis is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Awfis, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Awfis:
Awfis is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Awfis!
